overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through a rural village with thatched-roof huts under an overcast, stormy sky at dusk. The atmosphere is moody and desaturated with dramatic cloud cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farmland path with thatched hut

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path, passing a thatched-roof hut on the right side

entered.detail: traditional wooden hut with steep thatched roof and dark timber walls
narrow winding dirt trail through grassy farmland
tall green grass and wildflowers stretching to the horizon
dense line of dark trees on the horizon beneath storm clouds
rustic wooden picket fence running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt path through rural farmland under a stormy, overcast sky. A traditional thatched-roof wooden hut stands prominently to the right, which he steadily passes as wooden fences come into view along the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field path with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path through open countryside, moving away from the first hut

entered.detail: solitary oak trees dotting the open fields alongside the path
second traditional hut visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving past the first dwelling, Geralt continues through open fields dotted with scattered oak trees and tall grasses. The path stretches ahead toward distant structures visible on the horizon as the landscape opens up around him.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching thatched hut with chimney smoke

events.description: smoke becomes visible rising from the chimney of the approaching hut

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching the second hut, observing the smoke and light from the dwelling before passing it

entered.detail: white smoke rising from the thatched roof chimney against the dark sky
warm orange light glowing from the hut's window
dark wooden entrance door on the side of the hut

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches a second thatched hut with smoke rising from its chimney and warm light glowing from within. He walks past the wooden structure, continuing along the path as the building falls behind him and the landscape opens ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt path that transitions from a confined village setting into an open, windswept landscape. It begins with Geralt walking past a traditional thatched-roof wooden hut and rustic fences under a heavy, stormy sky. As he moves beyond the first dwelling, the scene expands into open fields characterized by tall grasses and scattered oak trees that stretch toward a distant horizon. The path then leads him toward a second thatched hut, where the moody atmosphere is punctuated by warm light glowing from within and smoke rising from the chimney. Finally, the camera follows him as he passes this second structure, leaving the buildings behind as the landscape opens up ahead.
